data.body: AC amendment: The fake adapter script in TEST_ADAPTERS_DIR must match the adapter filename convention: if the test registry entry has adapter='fake-adapter.sh', then TEST_ADAPTERS_DIR must contain a script named 'fake-adapter.sh'. The convention is: executor reads adapter field from registry → looks for '{TEST_ADAPTERS_DIR}/{adapter_field_value}'. This must match the executor implementation in 53d7-c1a8. Document this convention clearly in the test setup comments so 53d7-c1a8 can conform to it.
